name: Nazi Lowriders
description: A white supremacist prison gang active in Southern California, especially Cypress, with small factions in Chicago and other states. Originated in the mid-1970s, recognized by California prison authorities in 1999. Known for extreme violence and a three-tier hierarchy. Allies include the Aryan Brotherhood and Public Enemy No. 1; rivals include Bloods, Crips, and Black Guerrilla Family.

sources.title: Hells Angels MC criminal allegations and incidents — Wikipedia
